seoTitle: Hayes Gap vs Haystack — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Hayes Gap and Haystack. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Hayes Gap vs Haystack: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hayes Gap and Haystack.
heading: Hayes Gap vs Haystack — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hayes Gap, New South Wales and Haystack, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hayes Gap has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Haystack (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hayes Gap or Haystack safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hayes Gap has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Haystack scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hayes Gap scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. Haystack scores 61/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hayes Gap or Haystack?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hayes Gap has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.52% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
